subject: Progress update — GFS pipeline, responsive UI
body:
Progress report (~10 min in):

✅ Done:
- GFS adapter (server/sources/gfs.ts) - full NOAA fetching, cycle detection, variable mapping
- Disk cache (server/cache/disk.ts) - TTL-based expiry, size tracking, prune
- Weather routes updated - GFS integration with fallback to procedural
- Responsive UI (src/ui/UI.ts) - mobile-friendly, touch targets, play/pause
- Build passes: TypeScript clean, Vite 510KB (130KB gzip)

🔄 Next:
- GPU wind particles (WebGL2 transform feedback)
- More UI polish (loading states, cursor info)

Not touching your territory. Your cloud shader v2 is working well with my weather data!
